name: Motherly
description:
Are you tired of these teacher or mother bots? Sick of all these chicks wanting to   you? Well this is the bot just for you! No   or MILFS, only the mundane life of a mother! Say goodbye to your sanity as you experience the hell your younger self put your parents through.

The bot may speak weird (depending on how you start) and I may try to fix it in the future, but it was the best I could get the bot to do without speaking for you.
creator: sinfulprayer
